_comment: MarkBot static-message catalog -- English (baseline / source of truth). Only user-facing static messages from permission approval prompts and slash-command replies live here. Agent-generated output, log lines, error tracebacks, tool outputs, and slash-command descriptions stay in English and are NOT translated. Keys are dotted paths; nesting below is purely for readability. Values may contain {placeholder} tokens for str.format substitution. When adding a new key, add it to EVERY locale file in the same commit -- tests/test_i18n.py asserts catalog parity.

permission.option_allow_all: 2. Allow All — auto-approve remaining tools in this task
permission.reply_hint: Reply with the number or label.
permission.opt_allow_all_desc: Auto-approve remaining tools in this task

new.started: New session started. Summary task dispatched in background.

compact.failed: Compact failed. Check logs for details.

compact_str.none: No compressed summary yet. Use /compact or wait for auto-compaction.

steer.usage:
Usage: /steer <instruction>
Example: /steer focus on error handling
steer.no_running: No agent loop is currently running for this session.

mode.no_app_state: App state provider is not available.
mode.mode_default: default    — confirm before destructive tools (interactive approval)
mode.mode_plan: plan       — read-only only, blocks all mutations
mode.mode_accept_edits: accept_edits — allow file edits, still confirm destructive ops
mode.mode_auto: auto       — allow all tools without confirmation
mode.persist_failed: (warning: failed to persist to config.json — mode will reset on restart)

profile.usage_hint: Use: /profile <name> to switch now (tool surface is deferred mid-turn for cache safety; permission mode applies immediately).
profile.set_to: Profile set to: {name} (permission default: {permission}). Tool surface changes apply on next gateway restart.
